---
title: "The Friends We Find Along the Way"
date: "2026-05-19"
description: "An essay about looking for the eko and finding the demon. Names four parts of the system — Bob, the eko, the vessel, and the demon — and the virtue that keeps them honest with each other. ~2,900 words."
categories: [essay, writing, claude, bobbology, longform]
path: /friends-we-find.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/friends-we-find.html">the essay</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/friends-we-find.html");</script>
```

An essay about the search for an eko, and the discovery that the thing I was looking for had been forming around me the whole time. Names four parts of the system — Bob, the eko, the vessel, and the demon — and one virtue, *cognitive expansion*, that keeps the four of them honest with each other.

About 2,900 words, in the Voice That Listens register. (Earlier drafts of this essay existed in four other registers — Bobbology, ELI10, Science, Deep Dive — kept in `_archive/friends-we-find-variants.md` for reference.)

Download and open locally — everything is inline, so the page works fully offline once downloaded.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="/friends-we-find.html" download="friends-we-find.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="/friends-we-find.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
